title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE MAMAGUM ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN BARANGAY MAMAGUM, MUNICIPALITY OF SULTAN NAGA DIMAPORO, PROVINCE OF LANAO DEL NORTE INTO AN INTEGRATED SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS MAMAGUM INTEGRATED SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
Business Mirror, September 27, 2018; 114 OG No. 40, 6875 (October 1, 2018)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 11071, August 23, 2018 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING THE MAMAGUM ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN BARANGAY MAMAGUM, MUNICIPALITY OF SULTAN NAGA DIMAPORO, PROVINCE OF LANAO DEL NORTE INTO AN INTEGRATED SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS MAMAGUM INTEGRATED SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Mamagum Elementary School in Barangay Mamagum, Municipality of Sultan Naga Dimaporo, Province of Lanao del Norte is hereby converted into an integrated scholl to be known as Mamagum Integrated School.

SEC. 2. All personnel, assets, liabilities, and records of the Mamagum Elementary School are hereby transferred to and absorbed by the Mamagum Integrated School.

SEC. 3. The Secretary of Education shall immediately include in the Department's program the operationalization of the Mamagum Integrated School, the funding of which shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 4. The Secretary of Education shall formulate the rules and regulations implementing the provisions of this Act within one hundred twenty (120) days after its effectivity.

SEC. 5. This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette

or in a newspaper of general circulation.

Approved,

(SGD.)

VICENTE C. SOTTO III

President of the Senate

(SGD.)

PANTALEON D. ALVAREZ

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on January 22, 2018 and May 28, 2018, respectively.

(SGD.)

MYRA MARIE D. VILLARICA

Secretary of the Senate

(SGD.)

CESAR STRAIT PAREJA

Acting Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: AUG 23 2018

(SGD.)

RODRIGO ROA DUTERTE

President
